mechanics.excerpt: Those freeborns who prove them: selves fit for warrior training are put through grueling pro gram designed to make them the best warriors they can be_ Casualties in these programs tend to run high_ along with the number of dropouts_ The losses are exacerbated by the tact that most of the training officers have Iittle regard for their charges and would as happily see them dead as see them pass their Trials of Position.
